title: GutterAid Patterns Configuration
description: Configuration file for GutterAid task patterns

filePattern.description: Glob pattern to match file paths (e.g., '**/*.test.js'). Uses picomatch internally.

taskPattern.description: Regular expression to find tasks within matched files

scripts.description: Array of scripts for [Run, Debug, Coverage] operations

oneOf.description: Command and arguments to execute. Can use ${group:1}, ${group:2}, etc. for regex groups, ${input:id} for inputs, and ${vscode:variable} for VS Code variables
Empty array if no script is defined
Null if no script is defined

name.description: Optional name template for tests. Can use ${group:1}, ${group:2}, etc. for regex groups and ${vscode:variable} for VS Code variables

terminal.description: Terminal to run the task in--'new' will always spawn a new terminal, 'active' will use the currently open terminal (or spawn a new one if there is none), and any other string will be used as a terminal id (spawning a terminal with that id if there is none). Default is 'active'.

killSignal.description: Signal(s) to send to the task process when cancelling (e.g., '\u0003' for Ctrl+C). Default is '\u0003'. Can also be 'dispose', which will dispose of the whole terminal.

type.description: Type of input: promptString for text input, pickString for selection

description.description: Optional description shown to the user

options.description: Array of options for pickString type

version.description: Version of gutteraid that this configuration was written for

matchers.description: Array of task matchers that define file patterns, task patterns, and scripts to run

inputs.description: Optional array of input definitions for task scripts
